title: Telemedicine | Piel en Armonia
description: Remote dermatology consultation with clear triage, responsible escalation, and continuity in Quito.
heading: Dermatology telemedicine in Quito
lead: Telemedicine matters when it saves time without thinning out diagnosis, medical judgment, or continuity.

thesis.title: Online care when it adds real clinical value
thesis.body: We define what can be handled remotely, what deserves closer watch, and when clinic review becomes the wiser step.

statement.title: Useful telemedicine, without losing medical judgment

internalMessage.description: We review context, risk, and progression to decide whether remote care is enough or whether in-clinic examination is already needed.

blocks.title: How it works
items: You share key history and clinical images taken with enough context to guide first review.
We prioritize risk to decide whether the case can be handled remotely.
We deliver an initial plan, care guidance, and a follow-up window when needed.
If warning signs appear, we speed the move into clinic.

blocks.title: When it usually fits
items: Previously assessed inflammatory flares that need adjustment
Follow-up of active treatment plans with recent change
Questions about progression between scheduled reviews
Initial guidance before traveling to clinic

blocks.title: When escalation is required
items: Rapidly changing, bleeding, or non-healing lesions
Intense pain, accelerated spread, or functional impact
Insufficient response to the first remote plan
Need for procedures or direct diagnostic examination

initiatives.title: Visual triage
initiatives.copy: A first reading through clinical images that helps prioritize risk and response timing.

initiatives.title: Flare control
initiatives.copy: Remote adjustments that contain flares between reviews and avoid lost days.

initiatives.title: In-clinic escalation
initiatives.copy: Referral into clinic when lesion behavior calls for direct examination.

initiatives.title: Quito continuity
initiatives.copy: A hybrid route shaped for Quito, with remote follow-up and timely clinic control.

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: If you need to compare other paths afterwards, you can return to services and continue from there.
